summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 and REQ-2 (removing '9 years of excellence' and 'Smart Class Digital Learning' blocks from the Homepage About section) and REQ-3 (adding a Payment Requests tab in the Admin Panel accessible only to authenticated admins). The implementation appears complete and consistent with the acceptance criteria.

hallucinated_features.description: The Payment Requests viewer includes status display (pending/approved/rejected) with StatusBadge component and pending count badge, which goes beyond simply viewing submitted requests (student name, fee category, payment mode, submission time).
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only required displaying student name, fee category, payment mode, and submission time. Status tracking and badge display were not requested, though this is a minor additive feature rather than a contradiction.
